emails.subject: Bank Paribas
emails.body: Hi Again, Would you please re-confirm via this e-mail that per your conversation with John Arnold and his with Louise, I am to pay $30,000,000.00 to Bank Paribas. I thank you for all of your help these past few weeks! gg
